# Nimiq Web Client

> The JavaScript library that lets you build blockchain applications directly in the browser — zero servers, zero complexity.

<u-page-hero description="The JavaScript library that lets you build blockchain applications directly in the browser — zero servers, zero complexity." title="Nimiq Web Client">



</u-page-hero>

## Start with 4 lines of code

Get up and running in under a minute.

<code-group>

```bash [pnpm]
pnpm add @nimiq/core
```

```bash [npm]
npm install @nimiq/core
```

```bash [yarn]
yarn add @nimiq/core
```

```bash [bun]
bun add @nimiq/core
```

</code-group>

<code-group>

```js [browser.js]
import init, * as Nimiq from '@nimiq/core'

await init()

const config = new Nimiq.ClientConfiguration()
const client = await Nimiq.Client.create(config.build())

await client.waitForConsensusEstablished()
```

```js [Node.js]
import Nimiq from '@nimiq/core'

const config = new Nimiq.ClientConfiguration()
const client = await Nimiq.Client.create(config.build())

await client.waitForConsensusEstablished()
```

</code-group>
